test_framework: Playwright E2E flows against fake-opencode server; static checks via eslint + tsc
build_command: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
verification_instructions: Run `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` to confirm no type or lint errors. The project does not have unit tests; validation is done through CI flow tests and static analysis.
environment_constraints: Full internet access. Node.js and npm available. No Docker daemon needed.
contribution_requirements: Test complete user flows not isolated helpers. Keep static checks green (lint + typecheck). The existing @opencode-ai/sdk must remain as fallback - do not remove it.
key_patterns: - lib/opencode/client.ts: API client with auth header building, normalized URLs, exported functions for each endpoint. - providers/opencode-provider.tsx: main context provider with useState for all state, useCallback for actions, exported via React Context. - components/settings/settings-sections.tsx: each settings card is a separate exported component receiving palette + data as props. - constants/theme.ts: IIG palette with light/dark Colors object. - Path alias @/* resolves to project root.
directory_structure: lib/ - utility libraries (opencode client, notifications, voice). providers/ - React context providers and service layers. components/settings/ - settings UI sections. app/(tabs)/ - Expo Router tab screens. constants/ - theme/colors.
